failures.description: The agent misread or incorrectly reasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch output, selecting the last item instead of the first item in an ascending price list.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and returned 11 available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price. The first item in the tool result is item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, so the relevant evidence was available before the failure. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which is actually the last and most expensive item in the sorted result. This contradicts the tool output and directly causes the wrong final answer.
